subcodes.first_line: O My servant! Know thou that We did send unto thee aforetime a Book - verily it was a manifest Book, yet the ungodly [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا غلام فاعلم بانا ارسلنا الیک کتابا من قبل انه لکتاب مبین ولکن المشرکین
subcodes.subjects: @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @suffering and imprisonment, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
